video_title: With Love, Meghan | Sneak Peek | Bonding in the Kitchen with Roy Choi
comment_text:
I am really starting to feel sorry for Meghan. This show is wonderful, filled with great recipes (that fried chicken, anyone?) and a glimpse into a truly comfortable and happy lifestyle. As a member of a minority and having a poor background, Meghan's entry into the Royal family must have been a big shock, and without the right people to coax her through it (you know how the British are - they don't hold your hand), she must have felt antagonistic and frightened.  

We judge people for their feelings, for their vulnerabilities, for the rare moments they try and dare have confidence in themselves. Everyone makes mistakes, Meghan is no angel for ousting the Royals as much as they aren't ones for being racist. 

Meghan has moved on, and here she is, being her authentic and happy self, having her friends around, and giving us all a glimpse into a world of priviledge where your heart, true friends, and sense of normalcy never leave. 

Meghan, I loved watching your show, your fun conversations, your great friends (who have better personalities than most real housewives haha) and your fun recipes. With love, your Fanbase.
